title: Using public accessor tasks/functions to read and write registers causes BLKANDNBLK error

features.name: nonblocking_assignment_with_exported_write_task
features.description: Code should include a register variable that is the target of a non-blocking assignment and has an exported DPI-C or public verilator task writing to it

features.name: nonblocking_assignment_with_exported_read_function
features.description: Code should include a register variable that is the target of a non-blocking assignment and has an exported DPI-C or public verilator function reading it

features.name: dual_exported_accessor_for_nonblocking_register
features.description: Code should include a register variable subject to non-blocking assignment that has both an exported write task and exported read function accessing it, which triggers BLKANDNBLK error
